[[File:Rune claws detail.png|left|140px]]
'''Rune claws''' are a two-handed melee weapon, requiring 40 [[Attack]] to wield. They are the third strongest pair of [[claws]].

Rune claws can be obtained either through [[smithing]], as a drop from the [[Shellbane gryphon|Shellbane Gryphon]], or looting [[ninja impling|ninja implings]]. They can be made at level 98 [[Smithing]] with two [[runite bars]] after completion of the [[Death Plateau]] quest, granting 150 Smithing experience.

==Special attack==
[[File:Impale.gif|thumb|230px|A player using the rune claws' special attack, ''Impale''.]]
Rune claws have a [[special attacks|special attack]], ''Impale'', which consumes 25% of the player's special attack energy and deals 10% increased damage. The special attack increases the time until the next attack by one tick (0.6 seconds). This effectively lowers your damage output by taking 25% more time to deal only 10% more damage.
